name: vlm-teapot-metal-mixed
description: Mixed-mode test: pixel-diff for regression + VLM for semantic verification of metal teapot

checkpoints.name: front-vlm-material
checkpoints.description: A 3D rendered teapot with a metallic material applied. The surface should appear shiny, reflective, or have a metallic sheen — not matte or flat-colored. The material should have visible specular highlights or reflections that indicate high metalness and low roughness. The teapot shape (body, spout, handle, lid) should be clearly identifiable. The background should be dark.
